//: Manually curated records that survive every research-pipeline.js re-run. The merge-seeds.mjs script reads this file, validates each entry, and overlays it onto data/raw-records.json before augment + build. seeds.json is committed to git (raw-records.json is gitignored). For each seed: stars/stars_display/version/contributors MUST be null — augment is the authoritative source for those. Slug identity matches augment-github-meta.mjs: extract github.com/owner/repo from (repo_url || url), else lower(name). blacklist entries are slugs to permanently suppress regardless of what the research pipeline returns.

records.name: thedotmack/claude-mem
records.description: Persistent memory plugin for Claude Code. Five lifecycle hooks capture session observations into SQLite + ChromaDB; relevant context is auto-injected into future sessions via hybrid FTS5 + vector search. (Note: the project's README ties in a community-issued CMEM crypto token on the BASE chain — orthogonal to the tooling.)
records.efficiency_gain: Eliminates the cross-session 'I have to explain the project again' overhead by surfacing relevant past observations automatically at SessionStart.
